title: No Pumpkin Overlay (Recipe)
description: This datapack adds a recipe that lets you remove the Carved Pumpkin overlay
body:
### No-Pumpkin-Overlay  

To get a **Carved Pumpkin without the overlay**, simply place a regular **Carved Pumpkin** in the crafting grid:  

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d388904d379e9f18444226dc739ea083c77ecf7d_0.webp)
